rationale: Educ. Code §21.415 governs school district employment contract terms regarding incentive payments under Subchapter O. It does not reference homestead exemption amounts, property tax revenue, or Tax Code §11.13(b). No textual or operational conflict exists between the proposed exemption increase and this statute.
quote: A school district shall provide in employment contracts that qualifying employees may receive an incentive payment under an awards program established under Subchapter O if the district participates in the program.
_note: No conflict. The rule text addresses employment contract terms for incentive payments, not property tax or homestead exemption provisions.
